title: Fat Cats
body:
## About
Let's face it, who doesn't want cats in Minecraft to be ***heckin chonkers***?\
"Fat Cats" is a resource pack that does just that, making cats nice and thick, or in other words, fluffier. To achieve this effect, their width is doubled and their height slightly increased.

Originally made for Bedrock Edition, I have ported the pack to Java and added the 8 missing textures.\
Make sure to check out the original pack and it's creator [here](https://mcpedl.com/fat-cats-addon/)!


<details>
<summary>Dependencies (Choose One)</summary>
  
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

</details>



---

*Made with [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/) and [Microsoft Paint 3D](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9NBLGGH5FV99?hl=en-gb&gl=EN)*
